effect:
All Character cards with 8000 power in your hand gain +2000 Counter.
[On Play]/[On K.O.] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 [Monkey.D.Luffy] or card with a type including "Whitebeard Pirates" and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
name: Portgas.D.Ace
